subject: [RFC PATCH v2 6/7] mm, swap: defer memcg_table allocation on physical clusters

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch optimizes memory allocation for physical swap clusters by deferring the allocation of memcg_table until it's actually needed. In a CONFIG_VSWAP build, memcg_table is allocated eagerly only when the cluster contains vswap allocations or direct-use slots. Otherwise, the allocation is deferred to alloc_swap_scan_cluster, which lazy-allocates on the first direct-use slot and skips entirely for clusters holding Pointer-tagged vswap backings. This change reduces memory waste on vswap-heavy workloads where zswap writeback is the only consumer of physical swap.
